theme_clusters: Route-first legal framing is mandatory for termination defensibility in China.
Evidence consistency across legal, HR, and payroll is a leading predictor of dispute posture.
Final settlement and tax handling are integral legal-risk controls.
Cross-border governance quality depends on explicit uncertainty escalation, not implied consensus.
